seoTitle: CUSD Calendar 2026-2027: Capistrano Holidays, Breaks & PDF
seoDescription: CUSD 2026-2027 calendar with Aug 18 first day, Jun 3 last day, minimum days, Thanksgiving, Winter Recess, Spring Recess, PDF and ICS.
calendarNotes: Capistrano Unified lists 180 school days for 2026-2027. The first day of school is August 18, 2026 and is a minimum day for elementary and middle school students. Fall Recess runs November 23-25, 2026, followed by Thanksgiving holidays on November 26-27. Winter Recess runs December 21, 2026 through January 1, 2027, and Spring Recess runs April 5-9, 2027. The last day of school is June 3, 2027 and is a minimum day for all students with graduation ceremonies.

calendarFaqs.q: When does CUSD start school in 2026?
calendarFaqs.a: Capistrano Unified starts the 2026-2027 school year on Tuesday, August 18, 2026.

calendarFaqs.q: When is CUSD Winter Recess in 2026-2027?
calendarFaqs.a: Winter Recess runs Monday, December 21, 2026 through Friday, January 1, 2027.

calendarFaqs.q: When is CUSD Spring Recess in 2027?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring Recess runs Monday, April 5 through Friday, April 9, 2027.

calendarFaqs.q: When is the last day of school for CUSD in 2027?
calendarFaqs.a: The last day of school is Thursday, June 3, 2027. The calendar lists it as a minimum day for all students with graduation ceremonies.

calendarFaqs.q: Does CUSD have school on Veterans Day?
calendarFaqs.a: No. The CUSD 2026-2027 calendar lists Veterans Day on Wednesday, November 11, 2026 as a district holiday.

calendarFaqs.q: When does CUSD Winter Recess end?
calendarFaqs.a: CUSD Winter Recess ends on Friday, January 1, 2027, and school resumes on Monday, January 4, 2027.

calendarFaqs.q: Are CUSD calendars different by school?
calendarFaqs.a: This page summarizes the districtwide CUSD 2026-2027 school-year calendar. Individual schools may publish separate campus events, bell schedules, athletics, graduation details, back-to-school night assignments, and activity calendars.

calendarFaqs.q: Where can I download the CUSD calendar PDF?
calendarFaqs.a: Use the official CUSD 2026-2027 calendar PDF link on this page for the source calendar. MySchoolDates also provides an importable calendar file for Google Calendar, Apple Calendar, and Outlook.

Yes. The 2026-2027 CUSD calendar lists minimum days for elementary and middle school students on the first day, elementary parent conference windows, high school final exam windows, and the last day of school.

calendarFaqs.q: Does CUSD have a calendar for each school?
calendarFaqs.a: Capistrano Unified publishes a districtwide school-year calendar, while individual CUSD schools may provide additional campus-specific dates for events, bell schedules, athletics, performances, graduation activities, and school programs.

Major CUSD holidays and no-school periods in 2026-2027 include Labor Day, Veterans Day, Fall Recess, Thanksgiving holidays, Winter Recess, Martin Luther King Jr. Day, Lincoln Day, Washington Day, Spring Recess, Memorial Day, and observed summer holidays listed on the official calendar.

calendarFaqs.q: Can I add the CUSD calendar to Google Calendar?
calendarFaqs.a: Yes. MySchoolDates provides an ICS calendar file that can be imported into Google Calendar, Apple Calendar, and Outlook. The file is a one-time import, so families should verify later changes with the official CUSD calendar source.

customSections.label: CUSD 2026-2027 Calendar Summary
customSections.content: The CUSD 2026-2027 school year runs from August 18, 2026 through June 3, 2027. Key planning periods include the first student day on August 18, Winter Recess from December 21, 2026 through January 1, 2027, Spring Recess from April 5-9, 2027, and the last student day on June 3, 2027. The district calendar includes 180 school days.

customSections.label: CUSD 2026-2027 Breaks Explained
customSections.content: These CUSD recess periods are the main planning windows for families because they affect childcare, travel, appointments, student activities, and school routines. Always confirm campus-specific events with the assigned school before making time-sensitive plans.

rows: A short Thanksgiving-week recess before the Thanksgiving holidays on November 26-27.
The longest continuous recess period in the CUSD 2026-2027 school year and a major childcare and travel planning window.
The main spring vacation week for CUSD families; school resumes Monday, April 12, 2027.

customSections.label: Planning Around the CUSD Calendar
customSections.content:
Families often use the CUSD 2026-2027 calendar to plan vacations, childcare arrangements, appointments, transportation, extracurricular activities, and campus events throughout the school year. Winter Recess and Spring Recess are the longest student break windows, while minimum days, parent conference weeks, teacher pre-service days, and high school final exam schedules can affect pickup times and after-school coverage.

The district calendar establishes the main academic schedule, while individual campuses may publish additional operational dates that apply only to their students. Parents should confirm school-specific announcements for back-to-school nights, athletics, performances, graduation activities, field trips, and program events that do not appear as districtwide calendar dates.

rows: Transportation, childcare, school supplies, and first-week routines.
Longer travel planning, childcare coverage, and holiday activity schedules.
Pickup arrangements, after-school coverage, and campus dismissal-time checks.
Elementary schedule adjustments and family appointment planning.
Summer program, travel, graduation, and end-of-year childcare planning.

customSections.label: CUSD Calendar Review Information
customSections.content: This page was last reviewed on July 22, 2026 against the official Capistrano Unified 2026-2027 calendar source. MySchoolDates checked the first day, last day, holidays, fall recess, winter recess, spring recess, minimum days, teacher workdays, semester dates, progress reporting dates, downloadable files, and official source links.

customSections.label: How This CUSD Calendar Was Prepared
customSections.content: This CUSD calendar page is prepared from the district's published school calendar documents. MySchoolDates extracts and reviews first and last student days, holidays and recess periods, minimum days and early dismissals, semester and reporting dates, and downloadable calendar files. Dates are checked against the official district source before publication.

customSections.label: CUSD Calendar Updates and Changes
customSections.content: School calendars may be revised after board approval, district announcements, or source-file updates. MySchoolDates tracks the published CUSD calendar version shown on this page and recommends checking the official Capistrano Unified calendar source before making travel plans, changing childcare arrangements, or relying on a minimum-day schedule.

yearNumbers.detail: Families begin the CUSD school year with the first student attendance day on August 18, 2026.

yearNumbers.label: Major Break Periods
yearNumbers.detail: Fall Recess, Winter Recess, and Spring Recess are the main scheduled student break periods for CUSD families.

yearNumbers.label: Spring Recess
yearNumbers.detail: Spring Recess is the main spring travel and childcare planning week for CUSD families.
